title: Dokhtare Lor ya irane druz va emruz
actors: Roohangiz Sami-Nejad, Abdolhossein Sepenta, Sohrab Poori
plot: The movie is about Golnar, a young teahouse girl who was kidnapped as a child and taken to Lorestan with a clan of bandits living among the Lors. The leader of the thieves, Gholi Khan, is beginning to look at her with interest now...
